title: Dynamic Trees TFC - Seeds
description: Addon that introduces greater usability for seeds  from Dynamic Trees TFC
body:
**Small mod that introduces great usability of seeds from dynamic trees.**
Each seed can be roasted on a firepit and the roasted seeds can be extracted using a knife.
Handful of roasted seeds satisfies a small amount of hunger and is a valuable and simple food in the early game.
The by-product of seed husking is seed shells which can be used as brown material for the composter.


very **important** - Remember that not all seeds are edible, although you can roast all of them.
we did not show this on purpose so that you could experience or seek knowledge about which seeds you can eat.
Ask a nature teacher, ask a forester or ask Google what seeds humans can eat

![sdr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jmVjdqM3/images/6593ede1f7ce260cfcce35fc30d8d502bb23bfd4.png)
